title: Accounts & Sales Support Manager #80939
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Business Consultancy / Corporate Service Provider
  • Position Title: Accounts & Sales Support Manager/ Accounting & Business Support Manager
  • Working Location: Macpherson
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon to Fri: 9:30am – 6.30pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and supervise a team of accounting and tax executives.
  • Provide coaching, training, and performance feedback.
  • Oversee day-to-day accounting and tax operations to ensure accuracy, efficiency and on-time filings.
  • Review full sets of accounts and GST reports prepared by the team.
  • Review unaudited financial statements and tax computations.
  • Ensure all client deliverables and statutory deadlines are met.
  • Prepare resolutions, AGM documents and changes in company officers/shareholding.
  • Maintain and update statutory records in line with legal requirements.
  • Build and maintain professional relationships with clients.
  • Handle queries promptly and ensure high client satisfaction.
  • Support sales team in documentation, onboarding, grants, and follow-ups.
  • Assist in preparing quotations, billings and communicating deliverables to clients.
  • Perform other ad hoc assignments and special projects as needed.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma/Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business or related field.
  • 3–5 years’ relevant experience in accounting, tax or corporate secretarial work.
  • Strong knowledge of Singapore accounting standards, GST and corporate tax.
  • Experience with cloud software (e.g. Xero) is an advantage.
  • Strong communication and client-facing skills

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #80939 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
